subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. We have heard thy call and make mention of thee in a luminous Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم انا سمعنا ندائک ذکرناک بلوح لاح
